title: nf-core/magmap pipeline - params.genomeinfo schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.genomeinfo

accno.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

genome_fna.errorMessage: Fasta file must be provided, the name cannot contain spaces and must end with `.fa`, `.fna`, `.fasta`, potentially followed by a `.gz`'

genome_gff.errorMessage: The name of the gff file cannot contain spaces and must end with `.gff` or `.gff3``, potentially followed by a `.gz`
